gameEntries.name: Collect
gameEntries.descriptionShort: Race to be first to collect the target number of coins!
gameEntries.descriptionLong: A fast-paced party game where players chase a coin around the arena. Each coin collected scores a point, and the first player to reach the target score wins the round.

guide.objective: Be first to the target coin count
guide.warning: Rivals race for the same coin
guide.tip: Cut straight to the next coin
